## Why It Works

It takes a seemingly overwhelming task (building a personal brand on the internet) and breaks it down into a simple one (spending 45 minutes per day networking and interacting with smart people). It also shows the juxtaposition between the short-term effort and long-term payout making it appear to be a no-brainer.

## Template

The [TIME]-minute [GOAL] exercise that smart [TYPE OF PEOPLE] do daily:

[ACTION 1] + [ACTION 2].

They don't [NEGATIVE ACTION 1], [NEGATIVE ACTION 2], or [NEGATIVE ACTION 3].
They [POSITIVE ACTION 1], [POSITIVE ACTION 2], and [POSITIVE ACTION 3].

My daily [TIME] routine:
• [SPECIFIC ACTION 1]
• [SPECIFIC ACTION 2]
• [SPECIFIC ACTION 3]

Simple.
You'll build a [ASSET] that compounds for [TIME PERIOD].

And Remember:
It's [IMPORTANT FACTOR].
Not [LESS IMPORTANT FACTOR].

How will you invest your next [TIME]?

## Example

The 30-minute client acquisition exercise that smart personal trainers do daily:
Build expertise + expand visibility.

They don't scroll fitness influencer feeds, criticize other trainers' methods, or waste time on fad workouts.
They share practical fitness tips, engage with potential clients' questions, and build a supportive online community.

My daily 30-minute routine:
• Post a quick workout video
• Answer fitness questions in local groups
• Engage with health professionals

Simple.
You'll build a client base that grows for years.

And Remember:
It's how you connect.
Not just what you know about fitness.

How will you invest your next 30 minutes to grow your training business?
